- More r", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "CHICAGO — A strategy of time-restricted eating with energy restriction and intermittent energy restriction alone both conferred reductions...", "direct_quote": "CHICAGO — A strategy of time-restricted eating with energy restriction and intermittent energy restriction alone both conferred reductions in HbA1c and body weight for adults with type 2 diabetes and overweight or obesity.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.7000000000000001, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "In a randomized clinical trial presented at the American Diabetes Association Scientific Sessions, 57 adults with type 2 diabetes and...", "direct_quote": "In a randomized clinical trial presented at the American Diabetes Association Scientific Sessions, 57 adults with type 2 diabetes and overweight or obesity took part in a 6-month diabetes education intervention.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.7000000000000001, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Two intermittent fasting strategies equally effective for we."}]}
